mapper.sql: SEQUENCE_NO, PK_T_SCHEDULER_LOCK_HISTORY, FK_T_SCHEDULER_LOCK, KEY_NAME, KEY_VALUE, RESULT_STATE, RESULT_BY, TRACE_ID, ERROR_MESSAGE, CREATE_TIME
mapper.select:
SELECT
from t_scheduler_lock_history h
AND h.FK_T_SCHEDULER_LOCK = (select l.PK_T_SCHEDULER_LOCK from t_scheduler_lock l where l.KEY_NAME = #{name} )
